metadata.title: Vogado — Legal counsel in Portugal
metadata.description: Find verified practitioners based in Portugal. Bilingual directory and VogadoOS workspace for lawyers serving the Portuguese market.

home.headline: Counsel,
home.sub: Discreet access to experienced practitioners. Judgment, clarity, and uncompromising standards.
home.lawyersTitle: Be where clients compare counsel — then win them with clarity
home.lawyersSub: Your Vogado listing sits next to structured credentials and indicative fees, so inbound interest starts informed. VogadoOS turns that interest into organized requests, replies, and files.
home.lawyersBen1Body: Prospects share practice area, location, and matter type before the first conversation.
home.lawyersBen2Body: Directory profile, credentials view, and a discreet consultation flow — built to convert serious inquiries.
home.lawyersBen3Body: Pipeline, messages, calendar, and documents live in VogadoOS so follow‑through stays visible.
home.lawyersCtaSub: Subscribe in minutes · Stripe checkout · VogadoOS access right away
home.stat1Sub: Median inquiry uplift after listing on Vogado
home.stat3Sub: With structured requests, templates, and routing
home.statDisclaimer: Illustrative benchmarks from Vogado partner programs; your results will vary by practice and market.
home.heroLawyersPitch: Your Vogado listing sits next to structured credentials and indicative fees. VogadoOS turns inbound interest into organized requests, replies, and files.
home.filtersHint: Refine before you search — same filters as the full directory.
home.whyEyebrow: When you need counsel in Portugal
home.whyTitle: Find the right lawyer for what you need
home.whySub: Compare profiles with context, then reach out in one simple flow — from directory to a useful first conversation.
home.why1Body: Filter by specialty and city — same controls as the full directory.
home.why2Body: See who practices where you need counsel.
home.why3Body: Indicative rates on the profile before you call.
home.why4Body: One consistent profile layout for fair comparison.
home.why5Body: Credentials, bar admissions, and experience at a glance.
home.why6Body: A guided request — less inbox noise, more clarity.
home.featuredSub: Peer-respected practitioners across core commercial disciplines.
home.featuredAreaHint: We’ll highlight partners who practice in that market.
home.featuredLocUnavailable: Location unavailable — pick a city below.
home.featuredLocDenied: Enable location in your browser to use this.

findExpert.title: Find your expert
findExpert.sub: Search by keyword, refine by practice and jurisdiction, and review counsel credentials before you inquire.
findExpert.emptySub: Loosen filters or try a shorter keyword.
findExpert.poweredBy: Cards list hourly rates as provided by counsel.

credentials.title: Credentials & admissions
credentials.educationNote: Additional CLE and executive programs available upon request during intake.
credentials.mattersNote: Detailed matter lists and references are shared under engagement and confidentiality agreements. Public indicators appear on the main profile.

consult.title: Request a consultation
consult.matterPlaceholder: Do not include confidential details you are uncomfortable sharing online.
consult.successBody: Thank you. {name} or their office will respond shortly to coordinate a confidential consultation.

login.title: Welcome back
login.sub: Sign in to your VogadoOS workspace.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.sub: We will email you a link to choose a new password.
forgot.sentBody: If an account exists for that email, you will receive reset instructions shortly.

join.title: Why join—and how you get started
join.intro: Vogado connects you with clients who are actively seeking representation. Pick a subscription, complete checkout in under a minute with Stripe, then access your VogadoOS workspace.
join.why1Body: Prospects arrive with context—practice area, jurisdiction, and matter type—so you respond faster.
join.why2Body: A structured profile, credentials view, and discreet consultation flow build trust before the first call.
join.why3Body: Pipeline, messages, calendar, and documents live in VogadoOS so nothing falls through the cracks.
join.step1Body: Select the monthly tier that fits your practice.
join.step2Body: Secure checkout—cards, wallets, and invoicing where enabled.
join.step3Body: Return here and open your workspace as soon as payment succeeds.
join.setupBody: Add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and three recurring Price IDs (STRIPE_PRICE_SOLO, STRIPE_PRICE_GROWTH, STRIPE_PRICE_FIRM) to enable live checkout. See .env.example in the repo.
join.membershipSub: All plans bill monthly through Stripe in EUR. Cancel anytime from your billing portal (link emailed after signup).
join.configureStripe: Configure Stripe to enable this button

joinSuccess.title: You are in
joinSuccess.body: Your subscription is processing. Stripe will email a receipt. You can open VogadoOS now—billing details sync automatically.

home.greetingSub: You have 3 new consultation requests today.

clients.sub: Manage matters and contact details for retained clients.

messages.sub: Secure messages with clients and prospects (placeholder inbox).

calendar.sub: Calendar and scheduling tools will connect here.

requests.sub: Full pipeline of consultation and intake requests.

notifications.sub: Alerts across leads, messages, and calendar.
